title: Implement caching system with decompose fallback
description: Implement a 4-file caching system (redisAdapter, memoryAdapter, cacheManager, cacheMiddleware) where the redisAdapter sub-task requires ioredis — which is NOT installed. When @kody decompose splits the task into sub-tasks, the ioredis import fails, decompose catches the failure, runs cleanup, and falls back to runPipeline() completing via the normal path using the in-memory MemoryCacheAdapter. Reuses existing src/utils/cache.ts Cache class as the fallback.
existing_patterns: src/utils/cache.ts — existing in-memory LRU Cache class to reuse as MemoryCacheAdapter
src/utils/di-container.ts — Token/DIDisposable pattern for cache lifecycle management
src/utils/result.ts — Result<T,E> discriminated union for explicit error handling
src/middleware/request-logger.ts — Express-style chainable middleware pattern for cacheMiddleware.ts
